title: "tristate in top-level IO" despite not declaring an input wire as tristate.

features.name: input port !== comparison with 1'bz
features.description: Code should include an input wire port compared with 1'bz using !== operator inside a submodule

features.name: unconnected input port in instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an input port is left unconnected (.port())

features.name: top-level module with no IO instantiating submodule
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with empty port list that instantiates a submodule with input ports
